_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: The Commission shall investigate the appropriateness of the determination of CO₂ emissions of small lorries with a TPMLM ≤5 tonnes. The 2027 review expressly covers possible inclusion of these vehicles.
prior.source_span: The Commission should investigate the appropriateness of the determination of CO 2 emissions of small lorries with a TPMLM of less than or equal to 5 tonnes in accordance with Commission Regulation (EU) 2017/2400
